raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX I had 4 charges to my XXXX XXXX Citi card that I did not make. All charges were made at stores in the other side of the country as well. One was a charge from XXXX for {$250.00}. The other 3 were from XXXX in Ohio for {$300.00}. I went through the Citi fraud process and they will not issue a credit to my account. I have followed all necessary steps to request information on how to resolve this but to no avail.
